edgms:educationalDigitalGame:
```
Prodigy Math
SMARTeacher
Prodigy Education
Prodigy Math is a fantasy-themed role-playing game in which students answer curriculum-aligned math questions to progress through battles, quests, and storylines. It is designed for elementary and middle school mathematics practice through adaptive math questions and game-based progression.
en
2011
Mathematics
Elementary School (K-5) Middle School (6-8)
Students will be able to practice and reinforce arithmetic, fractions, and algebraic thinking through adaptive gameplay.
Role-Playing Game (RPG)
Web Browser iOS Android
Single-player
Explicitly Educational Game
Active
Freemium ```
